message:
feat(health): enhance health endpoints with version, uptime, and capabilities

Add comprehensive build-info service and update health routes:
- build-info.ts: Service providing version, git commit, branch, uptime,
  memory usage, and feature capabilities
- /health: Now returns version, commit, environment, uptime
- /health/ready: Now includes build info, runtime stats, and capabilities
  in addition to existing dependency checks

Features:
- Git commit SHA and branch name
- Server uptime in human-readable format
- Memory usage tracking
- Feature capability advertisement (websocket, checkpoints, fleet, etc.)
- All existing tests passing

Closes flywheel_gateway-fkr, flywheel_gateway-sau

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
